case_title: KLYACHKO, LEONID VS DVORKIN, MICHAEL: THE OWNER OF OXMAN COLLEGE

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT DVORKIN, MICHAEL: THE OWNER OF OXMAN COLLEGE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT KLYACHKO, LEONID COMMMISSION FOR LOPEZ 7 VANDERLY - THIS SHOULD NOT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KLYACHKO, LEONID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DVORKIN, MICHAEL: THE OWNER OF OXMAN COLLEGE $277.00 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 INTEREST, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $313.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY KLYACHKO, LEONID AS TO DEFENDANT DVORKIN, MICHAEL: THE OWNER OF OXMAN COLLEGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-08-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
